hooks.command: CHANGES=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$CHANGES" ]; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "STOP: You have uncommitted changes. You MUST create a branch, commit, build with ./deploy.sh, and create a PR before stopping."}'; fi

CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^gh pr create' && ! echo "$CMD" | grep -q '\-\-repo jss367/Airlock'; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "BLOCKED: All PRs MUST use --repo jss367/Airlock. NEVER create PRs against the upstream nikitabobko/AeroSpace repo."}'; fi
